settings.title: Settings
settings.hotkeyPrompt: Press the new key combination … (Esc cancels)
settings.hotkeyTaken: This combination is already in use by another application.
settings.hotkeyError: This hotkey could not be registered.
settings.hotkeyInactive: The hotkey {hotkey} could not be registered — another application is probably using it. Record a different one.
settings.gameElevated: Star Citizen is running as administrator — the hotkey will not fire in-game. Run the Companion as administrator or start the RSI Launcher without admin rights.
settings.updateFailed: Update check failed — try again later.

login.title: Connect to STARVEIN
login.intro: Sign in with your Discord account to capture refinery jobs straight from the game.
login.codeHint: Confirm this code in your browser:
login.waiting: Waiting for confirmation in the browser …

errors.denied: Access was denied in the browser.
errors.expired: The code expired — please try again.
errors.protocol: Could not reach the server — please try again.

jobs.title: My refinery jobs
jobs.refreshFailed: Refresh failed — the list may be stale.
jobs.collectFailed: Could not collect the job — is the server reachable?
jobs.collectRateLimited: Rate limit reached — please wait a moment and try again.

notification.title: Refinery job ready
notification.body: Your work order at {terminal} is ready to collect.

capture.hotkeyHint: In-game hotkey: {hotkey} at the refinery terminal — or test manually here.
capture.catalogsFailed: Could not load the catalogs — is the server reachable?

errors.missingTerminal: Pick the refinery terminal you are docked at.
errors.invalid: Please check ores, quantities, method and duration.
errors.rateLimited: Rate limit reached — please wait a moment and try again.
errors.protocol: Could not create the job — is the server reachable?
